articles.title: House Backs Haiti TPS Extension in Rare Bipartisan Rebuke to Trump Immigration Push
articles.summary: A procedural victory in the House on Thursday underscored cracks in Republican unity as lawmakers moved to force a vote on extending protections for Haitian immigrants.

articles.title: IMF warns Iran war has jolted global growth, lifting inflation and squeezing households
articles.summary: The fund’s April outlook says the shock is already filtering through energy, food and trade prices, leaving policymakers with a harder inflation fight and weaker growth.

articles.title: New CRISPR design shrinks gene-editing tools enough to fit standard delivery vehicles
articles.summary: An NIH-funded team says it has engineered a smaller, more efficient CRISPR system that could help move gene editing from cells in a dish into treatments delivered directly inside the body.

articles.title: CinemaCon 2026’s biggest Film news: studios lean harder on theatrical as Amazon MGM unveils ‘Spaceballs: The New One’
articles.summary: At CinemaCon in Las Vegas, Amazon MGM, Sony and other studios signaled a louder-than-usual bet on theaters, with new franchise titles, release plans and a fresh push to keep moviegoing central in a streaming-split market.

articles.title: OpenAI broadens cyber-defensive AI push as companies race to secure the agent era
articles.summary: A new OpenAI security preview, a stricter access model for cyber use, and a fresh wave of supply-chain warnings show how fast AI vendors are trying to turn frontier models into defensive tools before attackers do.

articles.title: Microsoft’s Wyoming data center push underscores the next phase of the AI buildout
articles.summary: The company’s planned Cheyenne expansion shows how the artificial-intelligence boom is moving beyond software into land, power, water and local politics.

articles.title: How the internet turned 2016 nostalgia into 2026’s most revealing microtrend
articles.summary: A decade after the selfie-filter era peaked, a new wave of 2016 nostalgia is spreading across social feeds — and exposing how much users now miss the pre-AI web.

articles.title: Pakistan-led diplomacy intensifies as Iran ceasefire reaches a fragile midpoint
articles.summary: As the two-week pause in the Iran war passes its halfway mark, Pakistan is trying to extend the truce while Washington’s blockade threat keeps pressure on Tehran and rattles global energy markets.

articles.title: BTS’s comeback is turning 2026 into a defining year for K-pop
articles.summary: After a four-year hiatus shaped by military service, the group’s new album, global tour and Seoul comeback show are signaling a broader pop-culture reset.

articles.title: U.S. blockade of Iranian ports escalates a war already warping global shipping
articles.summary: More than 10,000 American troops are enforcing the maritime blockade, with vessels turning back and Gulf trade routes increasingly strained as diplomacy scrambles to catch up.
